subject: [PATCH v3 3/3] iova: defer maple tree erase on GFP_ATOMIC failure

reviews.author: Rik van Riel
reviews.summary: Raised several technical concerns about introducing a special entry for gaps, including gap calculation code changes, edge case handling, and data consistency during rebalancing.

2026-06-18.patch_summary: Proposal to add a special entry in the maple tree to represent gaps, allowing for more efficient gap search and re-use.
